description:
**Milestone:** Dashboards + Loki Log Aggregation

Add Loki and Promtail services to docker-compose.monitoring.yml. Configure Promtail to tail Docker container logs via the Docker socket. Create monitoring/promtail/config.yml with job configs that label logs by container name and compose service. Add Loki as a Grafana data source in provisioning. Verify logs from server, UI, and docs containers appear in Grafana Explore.

**Files to Modify:**
- docker-compose.monitoring.yml
- monitoring/promtail/config.yml
- monitoring/loki/local-config.yml
- monitoring/grafana/provisioning/datasources/loki.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Loki service running and accepting log pushes
- [ ] Promtail tailing all Docker container logs
- [ ] Logs searchable in Grafana Explore by container name
- [ ] Log labels include service name, container name, compose project
- [ ] Loki retention set to 7 days to manage disk usage

**Complexity:** medium
